ops.title: Track K: captain-hook rebuild on daemonkit
ops.description: Execute curious-karp with substrate swapped: helper/ on Swift DaemonKit + templates; release-app.yml call inside release-pypi.yml (never rename — Trusted Publishing pins the path). Pinned contracts verbatim: helper.sock v1 envelope, status.json schema 1, refresh probe order, notification-identifier scheme. Deviations: LoginItem.reconcile replaces one-shot registration; RefreshCommand escape hatch → test-only; osascript fallback dropped (log + Lane.dropped); typed client outcomes; widget reloads ≥5min.

ops.text: karp verification end-to-end incl. notify-test.sh banner+click from /Applications
Trusted Publishing path unchanged; helper-gate survives; change-gate skip proof
